x-enumeration-literals.name: RIC
x-enumeration-literals.description: Reuters Identification Code (RIC). A numbering system used within the Reuters system to identify instruments worldwide. The RIC contains an X-character market specific code (can be the CUSIP or EPIC codes) followed by a full stop, then the two-digit ISO country code, eg, IBM in UK is IBM.UK. ISO20022

x-enumeration-literals.name: TickerSymbol
x-enumeration-literals.description: Letters that identify a stock traded on a stock exchange. The Ticker Symbol is a short and convenient way of identifying a stock, eg, RTR.L for Reuters quoted in London. ISO20022

x-enumeration-literals.name: Bloomberg
x-enumeration-literals.description: Identifier of a security assigned by the Bloomberg organisation.ISO20022

x-enumeration-literals.name: CTA
x-enumeration-literals.description: Identifier of a security assigned by the Consolidated Tape Association.ISO20022

x-enumeration-literals.name: Common
x-enumeration-literals.description: Identifier of securities issued in Luxembourg.  The common code is a 9-digit code that replaces the CEDEL (Clearstream) and Euroclear codes.ISO20022

x-enumeration-literals.name: Name
x-enumeration-literals.description: Name of the financial instrument in free format text.ISO20022

x-enumeration-literals.name: SEDOL
x-enumeration-literals.description: Stock Exchange Daily Official List (SEDOL) number.  A code used by the London Stock Exchange to identify foreign stocks, especially those that aren't actively traded in the US and don't have a CUSIP number.ISO20022

x-enumeration-literals.name: CUSIP
x-enumeration-literals.description: Committee on Uniform Securities and Identification Procedures (CUSIP). The standards body that created and maintains the securities classification system in the US. The CUSIP is composed of a 9-character number that uniquely identifies a particular security.  Non-US securities have a similar number called the CINS number.ISO20022

x-enumeration-literals.name: QUICK
x-enumeration-literals.description: Identifier of a security assigned by the Japanese QUICK identification scheme for financial instruments.ISO20022

x-enumeration-literals.name: Wertpapier
x-enumeration-literals.description: Wertpapier Kenn-nummer.  A number issued in Germany by the Wertpapier Mitteilungen. The Wertpapier Kenn-nummer, sometimes called WPK, contains 6-digits, but no check digit. There are different ranges of numbers representing different classes of securities.ISO20022

x-enumeration-literals.name: Dutch
x-enumeration-literals.description: Identifier for Dutch securities.ISO20022

x-enumeration-literals.name: Valoren
x-enumeration-literals.description: Identifier for Swiss securities assigned by Telekurs Financial, the Swiss numbering agency.ISO20022

x-enumeration-literals.name: Sicovam
x-enumeration-literals.description: Identifier for French securities assigned by the Societe Interprofessionnelle Pour La Compensation des Valeurs Mobilieres in France.  The Sicovam is composed of 5-digits.ISO20022

x-enumeration-literals.name: Belgian
x-enumeration-literals.description: Identifier for Belgian securities.ISO20022

x-enumeration-literals.name: IdentificationSuffix
x-enumeration-literals.description: Identifies the suffix of the security identification.ISO20022

x-enumeration-literals.name: GenericIdentification
x-enumeration-literals.description: Proprietary identification of a security assigned by an institution or organisation.ISO20022

x-enumeration-literals.name: ValidityPeriod
x-enumeration-literals.description: Specifies the period during which an identification is valid.ISO20022

x-enumeration-literals.name: ApplicableTradingMarket
x-enumeration-literals.description: Market(s) on which the trading identification is used.ISO20022

x-enumeration-literals.name: PrimeIdentification
x-enumeration-literals.description: Specifies the main identification of a security.ISO20022

x-enumeration-literals.name: RelatedOtherIdentification
x-enumeration-literals.description: Alternate security identification(s) related to the security trading identification.ISO20022

x-enumeration-literals.name: TradingIdentification
x-enumeration-literals.description: Security identifier specific to a trading market or markets, for example, Ticker.ISO20022
